👨‍💻 Hii, Katleho here

BSc Computer Science & Mathematics | CTF Enthusiast

📚 My Journey

I discovered cybersecurity during my first year studying ICT at University of Mpumalanga (2022). Seeking deeper technical challenges, I transferred to North West University(NWU) 2023 for Computer Science and Mathematics.

Though NWU lacks formal cybersecurity modules, their SANReN CTF program became my training ground. This exclusive competition (not available at UMP) ignited my passion for security research.

🚩 CTF Experience

I actively compete on:

  • Attack/Defense challenges
  • Microcorruption embedded security
  • CTF challenges

🔍 Current Focus

Preparing for National CTF 2025 while:

  • Competing in weekly ctf(CTFtime)
  • Developing exploit writing skills using python
  • Contributing to TryHackMe rooms

💬 Let's Connect
